blended.narrative: Cypress Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 53 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 42°F.

Tuesday: 7" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Wednesday: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 5" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 22" of heavy snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
